zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha d'Aumale於1005年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾時，她的父親Guerinfrey d'Aumale41歲，母親Hermengarde d'Auvergne31歲。她與Hugues de Ponthieu II結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1052年在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉利吉-斯-普萊斯享年47歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆沙吉利吉。

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha d'Aumale was born in 1005, in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Guerinfrey d'Aumale, was 41 and her mother, Hermengarde d'Auvergne, was 31. She married Hugues de Ponthieu II. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1052, in Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 47, and was buried in Saint-Riquier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha d'Aumale est née en 1005, à Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guerinfrey d'Aumale, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Hermengarde d'Auvergne, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues de Ponthieu II. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1052, à Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Riquier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha d'Aumale 1005 in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guerinfrey d'Aumale 41 und ihre Mutter Hermengarde d'Auvergne 31. Sie hat Hugues de Ponthieu II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1052 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Riquier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha d'Aumale è nata il nel 1005 nel Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Guerinfrey d'Aumale, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Hermengarde d'Auvergne, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Hugues de Ponthieu II. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1052, nel Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Riquier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha d'Aumaleが1005年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアウマルで生まれた時，父Guerinfrey d'Aumaleは41歳，母Hermengarde d'Auvergneは31歳であった。Hugues de Ponthieu IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1052年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-リクイエル-eス-プレインスで47歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメサイント-リクイエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha d'Aumale(이)가 1005년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 오마일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guerinfrey d'Aumale(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hermengarde d'Auvergne(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Hugues de Ponthieu II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1052년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-리키-e스-플레이스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 세인트-리키어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha d'Aumale nasceu em 1005, em Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guerinfrey d'Aumale, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Hermengarde d'Auvergne, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues de Ponthieu II. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1052, em Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Riquier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha d'Aumale родилась в 1005 г. в местности аумеил, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guerinfrey d'Aumale было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Hermengarde d'Auvergne, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues de Ponthieu II. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1052 г. в местности сеинт-рикуиир-eс-плеинс, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-рикуиир, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertha d'Aumale nació en 1005, en Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guerinfrey d'Aumale, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Hermengarde d'Auvergne, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Hugues de Ponthieu II. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1052, en Saint-Riquier-ès-Plains, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Riquier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
